answer:
The incorrect statement is A. Harmonics and overtones are not defined the same way; the first overtone is the second harmonic, so its frequency is twice the fundamental, but the first harmonic is the fundamental itself. Options B and C are correct, as overtones and harmonics are integer multiples of the fundamental, while partials may not be. Option D is also correct, as the fundamental is typically the most prominent in clear-pitch instruments.

\boxed{A}
